{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Product Marketing / Brand Manager",
  "description": "D-TECH CENTRIX&nbsp;Plus Limited is a leading career and education consultancy company that guides individuals toward successful career paths.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Marketing / Brand Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	This role is central to shaping how users experience and adopt the Pathfinder App.
	You will develop and execute product marketing strategies, lead launch campaigns, build compelling visual and written messaging, and collaborate across teams to ensure a successful market introduction.
	You will also oversee brand consistency, app-focused creative assets, and performance-driven content that drives user acquisition, engagement, and retention.


Key Responsibilities
Product Launch &amp; Go-to-Market Strategy:


	Lead the end-to-end launch of the Pathfinder App, overseeing positioning, messaging, user communication, and promotional rollouts.
	Develop multi-channel campaigns (social, email, content, ads, influencers) to drive awareness, sign-ups, and activation.
	Create launch decks, user guides, onboarding scripts, promo videos, and app store creatives.


Brand Positioning &amp; Creative Directon:


	Establish and maintain a consistent brand identity across all app marketing materials.
	Oversee the creation of visuals, app screens, landing pages, graphics, animations, and short-form promotional videos.
	Build brand systems, templates, and style guides that internal teams and partners can use.


Content &amp; Messaging Development:


	Craft clear, persuasive product messaging that communicates the app&rsquo;s value propositions to students, job seekers, and professionals.
	Produce copy for ads, social campaigns, push notifications, blogs, email sequences, and the app onboarding journey.
	Translate app features and technical details into relatable, benefit-driven communication.


Creative Asset Development:


	Lead the design and production of marketing collateral:&nbsp;brochures, pitch decks, video creatives, app promotion kits, social ads, influencer toolkits, etc.
	Use design and video editing skills to create high-performing visual assets across platforms.


Market, User &amp; Competitor Research:


	Conduct research on target users, competitor apps, industry trends, and emerging content/design patterns.
	Apply insights to refine product messaging, app features, and campaign strategies.
	Provide monthly reports on user behavior patterns and app market trends.


Performance Marketing Collaboration:


	Work with the Digital Marketing team to run performance-driven app campaigns on Meta, TikTok, and Google.
	Manage A / B tests for creatives, messaging, and user flows to improve acquisition, engagement, and retention.
	Analyze app metrics such as activation rate, user drop-off, session time, feature usage, and funnel performance.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Work closely with Product Development on feature roll-outs, user onboarding, and in-app communication strategies.
	Collaborate with the Sales, Digital Marketing, and Creative teams to ensure aligned messaging and consistent execution.
	Coordinate with freelancers (designers, videographers, etc.) to deliver high-quality creative outputs.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field (MBA is an advantage).
	Proven experience as a Product Marketing Manager or similar role, ideally within tech, apps, or digital products.
	Strong background in brand management, graphics design, and content creation.
	Proficiency in design tools (Adobe suite, Canva, Figma) and video editing software.
	Experience launching apps or leading major product campaigns is a strong plus.
	Skilled in developing go-to-market plans, product positioning, and high-converting creatives.
	Strong understanding of user behavior, data analytics, and performance marketing.
	Excellent communication and storytelling abilities&mdash;both written and visual.
	Ability to work effectively across teams and manage multiple fast-moving projects.


What Success Looks Like:


	Strong market awareness and successful app launch milestones.
	Consistent and compelling brand identity across all platforms.
	High-performing creatives resulting in increased app sign-ups, engagement, and retention.
	App funnel improvements driven by data insights and optimized messaging.
	Timely delivery of marketing campaigns, launch materials, and creative assets.
	Growth in user acquisition, brand visibility, and community engagement.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.




Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified send their CV / Resume and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@mypathfinderconsulting.com&nbsp;using &quot;Product Marketing Manager &ndash; [Your Name]&quot; as the subject ofthe email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-16",

    "@type": "Organization",

    }

Product Marketing / Brand Manager Job at D-Tech Centrix Plus Limited




        
    

        
        D-TECH CENTRIX Plus Limited is a leading career and education consultancy company that guides individuals toward successful career paths.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Marketing / Brand Manager
Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This role is central to shaping how users experience and adopt the Pathfinder App.
	You will develop and execute product marketing strategies, lead launch campaigns, build compelling visual and written messaging, and collaborate across teams to ensure a successful market introduction.
	You will also oversee brand consistency, app-focused creative assets, and performance-driven content that drives user acquisition, engagement, and retention.


Key Responsibilities
Product Launch & Go-to-Market Strategy:


	Lead the end-to-end launch of the Pathfinder App, overseeing positioning, messaging, user communication, and promotional rollouts.
	Develop multi-channel campaigns (social, email, content, ads, influencers) to drive awareness, sign-ups, and activation.
	Create launch decks, user guides, onboarding scripts, promo videos, and app store creatives.


Brand Positioning & Creative Directon:


	Establish and maintain a consistent brand identity across all app marketing materials.
	Oversee the creation of visuals, app screens, landing pages, graphics, animations, and short-form promotional videos.
	Build brand systems, templates, and style guides that internal teams and partners can use.


Content & Messaging Development:


	Craft clear, persuasive product messaging that communicates the app’s value propositions to students, job seekers, and professionals.
	Produce copy for ads, social campaigns, push notifications, blogs, email sequences, and the app onboarding journey.
	Translate app features and technical details into relatable, benefit-driven communication.


Creative Asset Development:


	Lead the design and production of marketing collateral: brochures, pitch decks, video creatives, app promotion kits, social ads, influencer toolkits, etc.
	Use design and video editing skills to create high-performing visual assets across platforms.


Market, User & Competitor Research:


	Conduct research on target users, competitor apps, industry trends, and emerging content/design patterns.
	Apply insights to refine product messaging, app features, and campaign strategies.
	Provide monthly reports on user behavior patterns and app market trends.


Performance Marketing Collaboration:


	Work with the Digital Marketing team to run performance-driven app campaigns on Meta, TikTok, and Google.
	Manage A / B tests for creatives, messaging, and user flows to improve acquisition, engagement, and retention.
	Analyze app metrics such as activation rate, user drop-off, session time, feature usage, and funnel performance.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Work closely with Product Development on feature roll-outs, user onboarding, and in-app communication strategies.
	Collaborate with the Sales, Digital Marketing, and Creative teams to ensure aligned messaging and consistent execution.
	Coordinate with freelancers (designers, videographers, etc.) to deliver high-quality creative outputs.


Qualifications & Skills


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field (MBA is an advantage).
	Proven experience as a Product Marketing Manager or similar role, ideally within tech, apps, or digital products.
	Strong background in brand management, graphics design, and content creation.
	Proficiency in design tools (Adobe suite, Canva, Figma) and video editing software.
	Experience launching apps or leading major product campaigns is a strong plus.
	Skilled in developing go-to-market plans, product positioning, and high-converting creatives.
	Strong understanding of user behavior, data analytics, and performance marketing.
	Excellent communication and storytelling abilities—both written and visual.
	Ability to work effectively across teams and manage multiple fast-moving projects.


What Success Looks Like:


	Strong market awareness and successful app launch milestones.
	Consistent and compelling brand identity across all platforms.
	High-performing creatives resulting in increased app sign-ups, engagement, and retention.
	App funnel improvements driven by data insights and optimized messaging.
	Timely delivery of marketing campaigns, launch materials, and creative assets.
	Growth in user acquisition, brand visibility, and community engagement.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified send their CV / Resume and cover letter to: [email protected] using "Product Marketing Manager – [Your Name]" as the subject ofthe email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Blunet is an innovative telecommunication company with the aim of providing great internet service in Nigeria.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive (Sales)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikota - Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities for fiber internet and connectivity service
	Prospect and onboard residential, SME, enterprise, and corporate clients
	Conduct market research to identify customer needs, competitors, and growth areas
	Present and sell fiber products such as routers, extenders, etc.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to ensure retention and repeat business
	Collaborate with technical and operations teams to ensure smooth service delivery
	Monitor customer feedback and resolve issues in coordination with support teams
	Meet and exceed assigned monthly and quarterly sales targets
	Maintain accurate sales records and reports for management review.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Engineering, or a related field.
	Proven experience (1&ndash;4 years) in sales, business development, or account management, preferably in telecom, ISP, fiber, or technology companies.
	Strong understanding of fiber internet services, bandwidth solutions, and connectivity products (an advantage).
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet sales targets.
	Proficiency in MS Office and CRM tools.
	Strong customer relationship and problem-solving skills.
	Willingness to engage in field sales and client visits.


&nbsp;Salary
N150,000 - N160,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;legal@blunet.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Executive (Sales) Job at BluNet Internet Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Blunet is an innovative telecommunication company with the aim of providing great internet service in Nigeria. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive (Sales)

Job Location: Ikota - Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and develop new business opportunities for fiber internet and connectivity service
	Prospect and onboard residential, SME, enterprise, and corporate clients
	Conduct market research to identify customer needs, competitors, and growth areas
	Present and sell fiber products such as routers, extenders, etc.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to ensure retention and repeat business
	Collaborate with technical and operations teams to ensure smooth service delivery
	Monitor customer feedback and resolve issues in coordination with support teams
	Meet and exceed assigned monthly and quarterly sales targets
	Maintain accurate sales records and reports for management review.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Engineering, or a related field.
	Proven experience (1–4 years) in sales, business development, or account management, preferably in telecom, ISP, fiber, or technology companies.
	Strong understanding of fiber internet services, bandwidth solutions, and connectivity products (an advantage).
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet sales targets.
	Proficiency in MS Office and CRM tools.
	Strong customer relationship and problem-solving skills.
	Willingness to engage in field sales and client visits.


 Salary
N150,000 - N160,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Representative",
  "description": "We are a business consultancy firmgrounded in Odoo ERPexpertise. As leaders in Odoo implementation in Nigeria, we help organisations harness the full power of Odoo to improve operations and productivity. As an award-winning Odoo partner, our priority is helping businesses unlock the full potential of their investment through a powerful and scalable solution like Odoo ERP.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Yaba, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time,&nbsp;Contract
Contract length: 12 months (Start with 6 month contract renewable on a rolling 6 months basis)

Job Summary&nbsp;


	Are you a driven and proactive individual hungry to make an impact in sales? Do you thrive in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment where your efforts are directly tied to your success?&nbsp;
	If so, we want YOU to join our team as a Business Development Representative (BDR)!


Mission


	Your mission is to drive new business revenue by generating Qualified Leads that convert into sales calls and closed deals.


Key Responsibilities
Generate qualified leads:


	Research and collect key lead data, including personal/business emails, city address, core services, and social media links.
	Ensure leads are high-quality and meet client standards.
	Upload and manage leads in CRM
	Prepare Quotes and Proposal write ups


Support Closing Ratios:


	Deliver leads that convert at a minimum 10% live call closing ratio (1 in 10).
	Collaborate with closers and Sales Manager to ensure success for both leads and clients.


Daily Administrative Tasks:


	Attend morning huddles (Google Meet Daily stand-up, Monday-Friday, 8.30&nbsp;am).
	Submit end-of-day reports with numbers, wins, and action plans via daily stand-up portal.
	Update CRM pipelines and team tracking sheets in ERP


Competencies for Success:


	Hunger/Work Ethic: Relentlessly pursue goals and continuously hone your craft.
	Pro-activity: Know where you stand on KPIs and adjust behaviour accordingly.
	Attention to Detail: Maintain accurate CRM data and hit all metrics.
	High Standards: Push yourself to perform at your best daily.
	Poise Under Pressure: Stay calm and focused during high-stakes conversations.


Position Details:


	Full-Time Role: 8+ hours/day, Monday-Friday, with weekend availability if KPIs fall short.
	Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with an internet connection. (Post probation Period)
	Communication: Active availability on whatsapp between 8 am-6 pm.


Requirements


	Previous sales experience with measurable success.
	Strong work ethic and willingness to put in the hours to excel.
	Coach-able with a desire to grow and develop skills.
	High-quality references are a must.


&nbsp;Salary

Business Development Representative Job at  erpSoftapp




        
    

        
        We are a business consultancy firmgrounded in Odoo ERPexpertise. As leaders in Odoo implementation in Nigeria, we help organisations harness the full power of Odoo to improve operations and productivity. As an award-winning Odoo partner, our priority is helping businesses unlock the full potential of their investment through a powerful and scalable solution like Odoo ERP.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Representative

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time, Contract
Contract length: 12 months (Start with 6 month contract renewable on a rolling 6 months basis)

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a driven and proactive individual hungry to make an impact in sales? Do you thrive in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment where your efforts are directly tied to your success? 
	If so, we want YOU to join our team as a Business Development Representative (BDR)!


Mission


	Your mission is to drive new business revenue by generating Qualified Leads that convert into sales calls and closed deals.


Key Responsibilities
Generate qualified leads:


	Research and collect key lead data, including personal/business emails, city address, core services, and social media links.
	Ensure leads are high-quality and meet client standards.
	Upload and manage leads in CRM
	Prepare Quotes and Proposal write ups


Support Closing Ratios:


	Deliver leads that convert at a minimum 10% live call closing ratio (1 in 10).
	Collaborate with closers and Sales Manager to ensure success for both leads and clients.


Daily Administrative Tasks:


	Attend morning huddles (Google Meet Daily stand-up, Monday-Friday, 8.30 am).
	Submit end-of-day reports with numbers, wins, and action plans via daily stand-up portal.
	Update CRM pipelines and team tracking sheets in ERP


Competencies for Success:


	Hunger/Work Ethic: Relentlessly pursue goals and continuously hone your craft.
	Pro-activity: Know where you stand on KPIs and adjust behaviour accordingly.
	Attention to Detail: Maintain accurate CRM data and hit all metrics.
	High Standards: Push yourself to perform at your best daily.
	Poise Under Pressure: Stay calm and focused during high-stakes conversations.


Position Details:


	Full-Time Role: 8+ hours/day, Monday-Friday, with weekend availability if KPIs fall short.
	Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with an internet connection. (Post probation Period)
	Communication: Active availability on whatsapp between 8 am-6 pm.


Requirements


	Previous sales experience with measurable success.
	Strong work ethic and willingness to put in the hours to excel.
	Coach-able with a desire to grow and develop skills.
	High-quality references are a must.


 Salary
N100,000 - N180,000 per month.      

    

        Click here to Apply
